items.headline: Source smarter from China
items.subhead: Get market clarity, verified suppliers, and structured quotes.
items.style: premium minimal layout, soft white background, navy accents, subtle abstract curves
items.prompt: Premium minimal social promo image promoting LineScout sourcing services. premium minimal layout, soft white background, navy accents, subtle abstract curves. Output size 1080x1080.
